name: @goatlab/delphi-brain
description: Delphi Brain — generic, company-agnostic reasoning engine: git-versioned knowledge base + hybrid FTS5/RAG search + self-evolution skills. Backend (Go) + frontend (React). Adapts to any company via brain.config.json and the _instance/ seam.

comments.why-no-build-test-lint: This is a polyglot package (Go CLI + npm-island React UI). It intentionally does NOT expose `build`/`test`/`lint` scripts so it stays out of the monorepo's default `turbo run build|test|lint` pipelines (which assume a TS/pnpm toolchain). Build it explicitly with `pnpm --filter @goatlab/delphi-brain brain:build` or `cd packages/delphi-brain && make serve-chat`. Requires Go 1.24+, CGO, and (for chat/RAG) Ollama.
